import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen: List<String> = []
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut found = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < seen.len()
    let s = match seen.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    if s == tok
      found = true
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not found
    seen = [tok, ...]
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
